news.t: Joe Terranova on the quantitative approach to the JOET ETF that identifies winners like Palantir early
Virtus ETFs Launches Core Equity Exchange Traded Fund Driven by the Investment Principles of Joe Terranova

holdings.infoBox: JOET is an equity ETF with a total of 125 individual holdings. The top holdings are Devon Energy stock at 1.42%, Micron Technology at 1.41%, Marvell Technology at 1.33%, Datadog at 1.31%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 1.15%.

overview.description: The Virtus Terranova US Quality Momentum ETF (JOET) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Terranova U.S. Quality Momentum index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of large-cap stocks in the US displaying quality fundamental and technical attributes. JOET was launched on Nov 17, 2020 and is issued by Virtus Investment Partners.

data.title: Virtus' Terranova on his new ETF that begins trading today
data.text: CNBC's Scott Wapner talks with Joe Terranova about his new index and exchange-traded fund, Virtus Terranova U.S. Quality. The ticker is JOET.
